description_long: This object is a classic AK-47 style assault rifle, featuring a combination of dark metal and polished wood components. The receiver, barrel, and magazine are constructed from matte black steel, while the stock, handguard, and pistol grip are made from reddish-brown wood with a smooth finish. The rifle has a curved detachable box magazine, typical of the AK platform, and a fixed wooden stock for shoulder support. Iron sights are mounted on the top, with a front post and rear notch visible. The muzzle end appears to have a simple slant compensator, and the overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for rugged urban environments.
description: A classic AK-47 style rifle with a black metal body, curved magazine, and reddish-brown wooden stock and grips. It features iron sights and a slant compensator at the muzzle.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from a front-left angle, highlighting the curved magazine, wooden stock, and the front sight post.
description_view_1: A direct side view showing the slim profile of the rifle, with the magazine edge-on and the wooden stock and handguard aligned.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from a front-right angle, displaying the magazine curve, trigger, and the wooden grip and stock.
description_view_3: A direct rear view, focusing on the back of the wooden stock and the straight alignment of the barrel and receiver.
